generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on motor for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current to permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MeasuredPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position data from motor and secondary encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData, SecondaryPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current data from motor current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated torque data derived from motor current measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated angular velocity from position encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData, SecondaryPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedDataTraces : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated data traces generated by simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardEnabler
]

instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML component & connector diagrams for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink model for the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink model for the gearwheel"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink model for the cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS)"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of friction models (white-box and black-box)"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionIdentificationInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization via dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationAction
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through friction model updates"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelUpdateAction
]

instance FrictionIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction identification insights used to improve robot motion control accuracy"
]

instance VisualizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Display real-time and simulated data on dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update friction models to improve motion control accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor (current input, torque output)"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component"
]

instance CycloidalGear : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gear component"
]

instance SinumerikController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for axis control via position, speed, or acceleration inputs"
]

instance FirstAxisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "The first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, comprising a permanent magnet synchronous motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox, with a maximum working range of [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed of 75°/s."
]

instance FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains FirstAxisComponent, MotorActuator, GearTransmission, CycloidalGear, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor, SinumerikController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction as the system is a digital shadow with one-way data flow from physical to virtual only."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing for live measurements."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrates sensors, SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, AAS, and MQTT for data linking, with processing components generating data traces visualized in a unified dashboard."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated stage, using live operational data for friction modeling during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity validated by comparing simulated data against measured data, accounting for load, temperature, and wear effects in friction models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical system to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) and SysML standards for modeling."
]
